chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.53 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 06.02.2026 Applicant and her counsel are called absent. No intimation is received. This is a date by Court matter. Non- appearance of applicant as well as her counsel reflects that they have lost interest to pursue the instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is dismissed on account of non-prosecution, along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
